long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between bas08b.sr02.lon04 Et33/1 <-> bcr01a.lon04 Et14/9. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19781
short_description: bas08b.sr02.lon04 Et33/1 <-> bcr01a.lon04 Et14/9 | Link Flap
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
